raw.message: EXCLUSIVE FLEX SPINS have landed on DraftKings Casino 🚀 Head to the app for your daily chance at FREE Flex Spins 🎰

hook.summary: Prominent display of a 'Free Flex Spins' offer with slot game icons flying into the center.
hook.visual_action: Slot game icons like 'Big Bank Breakout' and 'Whitney Houston' fly from the edges toward the center over a purple background.

scene_flow: Initial reveal of the DraftKings Casino logo and the 'Free Flex Spins' headline.
Slot game tiles fly from the edges to the center of the screen in a dynamic motion.
The tiles rotate and swap to showcase a variety of available slot games like Cleopatra and Hyper Nova.
The animation settles on a grid of games with the promotional logo and extensive legal disclaimers.
on_screen_text: GET A DAILY CHANCE AT FREE FLEX SPINS
cta_text: GET A DAILY CHANCE AT FREE FLEX SPINS
